prompt: Use the image just shown as the visual reference for Dusty Rodd. Create a square 2D game sprite sheet with exactly 4 equal cells arranged as a 2x2 grid, read top-left, top-right, bottom-left, bottom-right. No visible grid lines, no borders, no labels, no text. Subject: Dusty Rodd, the exact same stocky miner from the reference, but seen from behind in every cell for a climbing loop. Preserve identity and style exactly from the reference where visible: same stocky proportions and height, same yellow hard hat with small lantern #ffd24a seen from rear/side, same dark hair/sideburn hint, same cream shirt sleeves, brown gloves and boots, denim-blue overalls #3fa7ff with back straps and bib seam, same 1px dark outline #141019, flat 2-3 step 16-bit pixel-art shading, crisp silhouette. Action: 4-frame behind-view ladder climb loop. Top-left: left hand high, right hand low, left boot on higher rung, right boot low. Top-right: hands passing, body centered, knees bent. Bottom-left: right hand high, left hand low, right boot higher, left boot low. Bottom-right: hands passing back to loop. Draw only one or two short dark-brown ladder rung segments per cell if needed for hand and boot contact, kept tight behind the body and fully inside the same cell; no tall ladder rails, no long props. Body-only arcade sprite, no detached FX. Keep the character centered in each cell, full body inside the central 60-70% safe area, consistent scale matching the idle reference within 10%, stable bottom/feet anchor line, no limb, hat, rung, or boot crosses a cell edge, leave solid magenta margin on all four sides. Background must be 100% solid flat #FF00FF magenta with no gradient and no shadow.
